message:
Fix scaleFactor reference error and meta_window undefined crash

scaleManager.js: Removed stale reference to scaleFactor parameter
(renamed to targetWidth/targetHeight in previous commit but line 72
still referenced the old name).

extension.js: Added defensive check for meta_window objects that
lack get_window_type (some window actors have undefined meta_window).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
